name: RPlog_The_Ex
title: The Ex
summary: Looking for parts to replace the failing motivator on her aging Z-95 Headhunter, the pilot Chana, Chanera Thorn, wanders an isolationist junk-and-shipbuilding station and approaches the well-connected, spice-smoking cyborg Zeak Oppenhiemer, who lounges with a pair of cybernetic women companions. Zeak points her toward parts dealers and the resourceful Jawas of Theseus, and the two strike up a conversation that reveals their tangled connections: Chana flies for Johanna te Danaan, Zeak's ex-wife, and her Z-95 may be one of the fighters Johanna took from him in the divorce. Chana recognizes Zeak's face in his and Johanna's son and shares her story of being a Clone Wars fighter pilot who survived decades in carbonite stasis before waking on Tatooine. They trade war remembrances of clone units and lament the bygone days, and Zeak invites her to ferry his children on their next visit before directing her to an old fabricator named Paleon, after which Chana excuses herself to buy her part.
